title: Briwax Original Antique Mahogany 400g-– Multi-Shade Wood Wax Polish | Ideal for Furniture Restoration & DIY Wood Projects
features: Briwax Original Furniture Wax – Fast-Drying Wood Polish with Enhanced Cleaning Power; Cleans, Renovates, and Enriches Deep Grain for a Lasting Shine; Available in 400g & 5L
Versatile Use Across Multiple Surfaces: Designed for wood, leather, metal, and even painted surfaces, making it an excellent choice for all-around furniture care and restoration needs
Easy Application and Long-Lasting Protection: The smooth consistency allows effortless application while forming a durable layer that protects against scratches and stains; ADD TO BASKET now
Two Convenient Sizes for Your Needs: Choose from 400g for smaller projects or 5L for extensive applications; both sizes offer the same premium quality and dependable results
Enhances Natural Grain and Finish of Wood: Restores life to dull, worn surfaces by highlighting their natural character and leaving a subtle, elegant sheen
description: From the manufacturer BRIWAX Briwax makes leading luxury wood finishes in England for discerning wood lovers and furniture makers. About Us Briwax makes leading luxury wood finishes in England for discerning wood lovers and furniture makers. Henry Flack started manufacturing French polishes and blending waxes in 1860 to supply the cabinet makers and woodcarvers in East London. After severe bomb damage during the Second World War, the company relocated to Beckenham in Kent. The Bollom family acquired Briwax in 1961 and in 2013 Briwax became part of the Rustins group. The Briwax Product range has been carefully selected from the finest traditional trade finishes drawing on 150 years of experience supplying furniture manufacturers. Many of the Briwax polishes and products are based on the original formulas developed to meet the quality demands of the professional finisher. The popular original wax polish offers a simple smooth finish for either unfinished raw timber or a final touch to a polished surface and is available in 14 different colour variations
